title: Model drift — Opus snuck in x2 after agent reset
rootCause: After agent reset, fallback chain reverted to claude-opus-4-7 for default.fallbacks and legal agent. Warden drift check detected the violation but policy update (CHG-0028) was required to re-align.
impact: Cost overrun — Opus is ~10x more expensive than Sonnet. 2 drift violations recorded. Warden escalated to Yoda.
resolution: Batch close — incident resolved, post-mortem complete or superseded. Closed by Yoda with Ken approval 2026-05-11.
prevention: Pre-risky-op checkpoint protocol (now in place from 2026-04-26). Model policy lock in place post-reset.
